user.title: Tuya Generic Thermostat - Step 1/3
user.description: How to get Tuya config details: Log in to Tuya Developer Platform (https://platform.tuya.com/cloud) -> 'Cloud Project', and open your project.

data_description.region: The Tuya Cloud Server Region for API connection.
data_description.access_id: Your Tuya IoT Platform Access ID.
data_description.access_secret: Your Tuya IoT Platform Access Secret.
data_description.remote_id: The Device ID of the smart IR remote in Tuya Cloud.
data_description.ac_id: The Device ID of the paired air conditioner.

data_description.target_sensor: Temperature sensor for current room temperature.
data_description.ac_mode: Set the actuator specified to be treated as a cooling device instead of a heating device.
data_description.cold_tolerance: Minimum amount of difference between the temperature read by the temperature sensor the target temperature that must change prior to being switched on.
data_description.hot_tolerance: Minimum amount of difference between the temperature read by the temperature sensor the target temperature that must change prior to being switched off.
data_description.min_cycle_duration: Minimum time between switching on and off.

presets.title: Preset Temperatures - Step 3/3
presets.description: Optional target temperatures for preset modes.
